artPrompt: Four gaunt spectral horsemen in tattered ashen robes rear their skeletal mounts up the height of the wide frame, charging down a smoke-choked precinct street beneath a blood-dark sky, one screaming horse foremost with bared teeth. Cold gold halos crown their hooded riders. A single lurid light source carves them from the deep black gloom, ash drifting around them, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Four Horsemen of the Precinct
text:
Trample
When Four Horsemen of the Precinct enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die: on a 4, it arrives alone and embarrassed (the other three are running late). Otherwise, create that many 2/2 black Horseman creature tokens named Famine, Pestilence, War, and Awkward Silence.
Whenever a Horseman you control dies, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
flavorText: They campaigned door to door. Their pamphlet was just a horse, screaming.
